subject: Refactor List Check in aria/csar.java
commit_message:
Refactor List Check in aria/csar.java

Fix for sonar blocker issue

Issue-ID: SO-703
Change-Id: I85140561251599a71570452e77461341b1670e61
Signed-off-by: Parshad Patel <pars.patel@samsung.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-profile-java/2132/

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-profile-java/2132/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.appc.client:client-kit:jar:1.3.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.so:common:jar:1.2.0-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.onap.appc.client:client-kit:jar:1.3.0-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.appc.client:client-lib:jar:1.3.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-profile-java/2132/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-verify-profile-java/2132

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi Parshad, Thanks for submitting this.

A couple points:

1. Please add reviewers to your patch when you are ready for review.
 
2. Please change your commit message header to describe exactly what you are changing. I.E. "Refactor List Check in aria/csar.java". Then in the paragraph following you can explain why you are making the change and perhaps put a link to the sonar issue you are fixing. Reference this doc for more info: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Commit+Messages 

3. Your author name should have your full name. Please fix this.

Otherwise the change looks fine to me. I believe the build is failing due to dependencies issue. I'll kick off another build.

Patch Set 1:

recheck
